overall.description: First-person gameplay footage walking through a dark, misty mountain valley at night. The player follows a dirt path through rocky terrain with sparse vegetation, passing a distinctive dead tree and encountering a wild horse before continuing into a narrow canyon passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty mountain valley with scattered trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path through the misty valley, approaching a distinctive dead tree

entered.detail: twisted leafless tree standing in the center of the valley
steep rocky mountain slope forming the left boundary of the valley
steep rocky mountain slope forming the right boundary of the valley
large pine tree with dense green foliage on the left side of the path
low stone wall running alongside the right edge of the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark, misty mountain valley with a dirt path winding through the center. A twisted dead tree stands prominently in the distance while rocky cliffs rise on both sides. The camera moves forward past a large evergreen tree and alongside a low stone wall, with sparse vegetation dotting the landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrowing mountain path with animal encounter

events.description: a brown horse appears standing on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path and approaching a horse standing in the way

notable_agents.action: brown horse standing on the path, then moving to the side as the camera approaches

segments.scene_description: The path narrows as the camera moves deeper into the valley, with rocky cliffs closing in on both sides. A brown horse stands on the right side of the path, becoming a focal point as the camera approaches. The previously seen trees and stone wall fall behind as the terrain becomes more rugged and enclosed.

events.description: entering a tight canyon section with steep rock walls on both sides

agents.ego_description: walking deeper into the narrow canyon, following the winding dirt path between tall rock faces

segments.scene_description: The camera proceeds through a narrow, enclosed canyon with steep rocky walls rising closely on both sides. The sky is mostly obscured by the towering cliffs and mist. The path winds deeper into the mountain pass, creating an increasingly confined and atmospheric environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark, misty mountain valley that gradually tightens into a confined rocky canyon. It begins on a winding dirt path flanked by rocky cliffs, moving past a large evergreen and a low stone wall toward a prominent twisted dead tree in the distance. As the camera pushes deeper into the valley, the terrain becomes more rugged and the cliffs close in, bringing a brown horse standing on the right side of the path into focus. The scene then shifts into a narrow, enclosed canyon where the towering stone walls rise steeply on both sides, mostly obscuring the misty sky. Finally, the path winds further into the mountain pass, creating an increasingly claustrophobic and atmospheric environment.
